name: 😇The god👁️ [Minecraft mod RPG]
description:
"Every decision matters. Will you become a hero... or will you fall into darkness? The being in heaven is always watching..." — Unknown person.

I decided to make a bot about the Minecraft mod 'the god' because this mod is cool. And yes, I played it. I hope you like it, as no one has been interacting with my bots lately :(

Request? No.

"You should have been kinder"

DISCLAIMER:

• English is not my native language, so there may be grammatical mistakes

• If something is wrong with the bot, write in the comments, I will try to fix them.

• If the bot speaks for you, then it's not my problem, I can't control them.

• If something is wrong with the message in the chatbot, try to change it.

• Gore and Violence there may be.
